title: Property Consultant - Phoenix Mills - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Phoenix Mills - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Phoenix Mills in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
